prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约6480名→9960名→8828名→19075名→12320名。2024年大幅后移至19075名，2025年回弹至12320名，整体呈宽幅震荡走势，近两 年波动剧烈。2025年基准位次约12320名；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划：2021年36人、2022年36人、2023年36人、2024年32人、2025年35人。2026年计 划34人，较2025年减少1人（-2.9%），小幅缩招，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国政法大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第56名，近年排 名稳定在50-56名区间，属于政法类顶尖院校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及早年校园安全事件，但属旧闻影响有限。抖音热度排名第6（高热），综合热度 约975万，短视频平台曝光量极高，反映考生关注度持续升温；法学为A+学科（全国最高等级），是该校核心王牌。物理类招生专业中法学相关方向（法学实验 班、法学双学士等）同样受益于A+学科声誉。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度维持偏热水平。江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约52.1万，物理类考生按近年占比约73%估算约3 8万人，较2025年（约26.1万）增长约46%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争压力显著上升。；中国政法大学位于北京，非江苏省本地高校 。物理类招生计划从2021年36人降至2026年34人，呈小幅缩减趋势，而江苏省物理类考生规模持续快速增长，供需矛盾加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12320名、202 6年计划小幅缩招（-2.9%）、江苏省物理类考生大幅增加约46%、抖音高热关注度等因素，缩招叠加考生激增，竞争预计加剧。预测2026年物理类最低位次约12159名，区间11659– 12659名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6480 → 9960 → 8828 → 19075 → 12320. In 2024, there was a significant drop to 19075, rebounding to 12320 in 2025, showing wide fluctuations overall, with severe volatility in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 12320. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Province Physics Category: 2021: 36, 2022: 36, 2023: 36, 2024: 32, 2025: 35. The 2026 plan is 34, a decrease of 1 (-2.9%) from 2025, a slight reduction in enrollment, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Political Science and Law is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 56th, with recent rankings stable in the 50-56 range, making it a top-tier political science and law institution. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving past campus safety incidents, but these are old news with limited impact. Douyin popularity ranks 6th (high heat), with comprehensive heat around 9.75 million, extremely high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting sustained high attention from examinees. Law is an A+ discipline (the highest national level) and the university's core strength. In Physics Category enrollment, law-related directions (Law Experimental Class, Law Dual Bachelor's, etc.) also benefit from the A+ discipline reputation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity remains relatively high. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 380,000 based on the recent proportion of about 73%, an increase of about 46% from 2025 (about 261,000), significantly expanding the examinee pool and markedly increasing competitive pressure. China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, not a local university in Jiangsu Province. The Physics Category enrollment plan has decreased from 36 in 2021 to 34 in 2026, showing a slight reduction trend, while the number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province continues to grow rapidly, exacerbating the supply-demand imbalance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12320, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (-2.9%), the significant increase of about 46% in Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province, and high Douyin attention, the reduction in enrollment combined with a surge in examinees is expected to intensify competition. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 Physics Category is about 12159, with a range of 11659–12659.

If your ranking is close to 11659, you can focus on reaching for the top-tier Law Experimental Classes; if your ranking is close to 12659, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1175 → 1385 → 1322 → 2155 → 1416. In 2024, there was a significant drop to 2155, rebounding to 1416 in 2025, showing overall large fluctuations, with a V-shaped trend of first declining then rising in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1416. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu: 42 in 2021, 42 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 50 in 2024, 53 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 56, an increase of 3 (+5.7%) compared to 2025, a moderate expansion that somewhat alleviates competition but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Political Science and Law is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 56th, with stable rankings in the 50-56 range in recent years, belonging to top-tier political science and law institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving an early campus safety incident (an outsider sneaking into dormitories to take photos in 2016), but this is old news with limited impact on current application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 6th (high heat), with comprehensive heat of about 9.75 million, extremely high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting continuously rising candidate attention, which may intensify competition. Law is an A+ discipline (the highest national level), the only A+ discipline at this university, and its core flagship major. The law major maintains A+ in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, tied with Renmin University of China for first place nationally, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: From 2021 to 2025, the popularity of the law major overall remained in the 'recommended' to 'divergent wait-and-see' range. In 2024, social attention was high but divergence intensified. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangsu Province general college entrance examination is about 521,000, a significant increase from 2025 (about 358,000). History Category candidates, estimated at about 27% of the total in recent years, are about 140,000, an increase of about 45% from 2025 (about 97,000), with a notable expansion in candidate scale and a clear rise in competitive pressure. China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, not a local university in Jiangsu, with no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu increased from 42 in 2021 to 56 in 2026, a 33% increase, but still insufficient relative to the growth in candidate numbers.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1416, the 2026 plan's slight expansion (+5.7%), the significant increase of about 45% in History Category candidates in Jiangsu, and the high Douyin attention, the mitigating effect of expansion is offset by the surge in candidate numbers, with competition expected to slightly intensify. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking for History Category is about 1474, with a range of 1209–1739.
